2026-04-09T01:04:07.4181495Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.

2026-04-09T01:04:07.4183510Z 
2026-04-09T01:04:07.4183695Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-09T01:04:07.4184004Z
